privileged_info_summary: The task relies on a synthetically generated dataset using the Hick-Hyman Cognitive Model Generator simulation in setup_task.sh. The dataset contains 20 compliant ('real') participants and exactly 1 intentionally contaminated participant (sub-99) designed to fail the 60% overall accuracy threshold with ~22% accuracy due to uniform random responses. The agent is explicitly expected to output the required analysis JSON to /home/ga/pebl/analysis/hicks_report.json.
